mapper.select: /* selectMdocmaAllDoccateList */ SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCCTNM FROM MDOCMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and DOUSEYN = 'Y' group by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCCTNM order by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCCTNM

/* selectMdocmaDoccateDoctypeRelations */ SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, DOCCTNM, DOCTYNM FROM MDOCMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and DOUSEYN = 'Y' group by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE order by COMPKEY, WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE
